NAME

Variable Documentation

const char* g_audio_source_descs[] [extern]

Definition at line 137 of file metadata.c.

137                                    {"Smart selection (media-only when playing files, mic-only otherwise)",
138                                       "Microphone only (no media audio)", "Media audio only (no microphone)",
139                                       "Both microphone and media audio simultaneously", NULL};

  int g_audio_source_integers[] [extern]


Definition at line 136 of file metadata.c.


136 {AUDIO_SOURCE_AUTO, AUDIO_SOURCE_MIC, AUDIO_SOURCE_MEDIA, AUDIO_SOURCE_BOTH};

  char* g_audio_source_values[] [extern]

  int g_render_integers[] [extern]
